sowing_time.answer: Sugarcane in UP is planted between February and April. Autumn planting can also be done in October.

harvest_time.answer: Sugarcane in UP is harvested between November and March, about 10-12 months after planting.

water.answer: Sugarcane needs 8-10 irrigations. Heavy irrigation required during April-June. Avoid waterlogging.

fertilizer.answer: Apply 150kg Nitrogen, 60kg Phosphorus, and 60kg Potassium per hectare for sugarcane in UP.

soil.answer: Sugarcane grows best in deep loamy or clay-loam soil with pH 6.5 to 7.5.

yield.answer: Average sugarcane yield in UP is 600-700 quintals per hectare.

disease.answer: Common problems are red rot, wilt, smut, and top borer insect attack.

seed.answer: Popular varieties in UP are Co-0238, CoS-8436, CoS-767, and CoJ-64.
